errorBoundary.body: We couldn't display this screen. Your balance and cashback are safe — try again.

signedOut.heading: Privacy & data
signedOut.body: Sign in to export your data or delete your account.

privacy.heading: Privacy & data
privacy.introPrefix: Export the data we hold about you, or permanently delete your account. See our
privacy.introSuffix: for what we collect and why.

export.heading: Export your data
export.body: Download a machine-readable copy of everything tied to your account — profile, credit ledger, orders, and payouts. Gift-card codes are not included for security; you can always view them on the relevant order.
export.doneNative: Your data was prepared — save it via the share sheet.
export.shareError: Couldn't prepare your data for sharing. Please try again, or email privacy@loopfinance.io.
export.exportError: Couldn't build your export. Please try again, or email privacy@loopfinance.io.

sessions.heading: Sign out everywhere
sessions.body: Revoke every active session, on this and all other devices. Use this if you think someone else has access to your account — you'll need to sign in again.
sessions.error: Could not sign out of all devices.

delete.heading: Delete your account
delete.body: This permanently removes your personal data and signs you out everywhere. For legal and tax reasons we keep an anonymised transaction record, but it no longer links to you. This can't be undone. If you have a payout or order in flight, finish or wait for it first.
delete.fallbackError: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email privacy@loopfinance.io.
delete.blockedPendingPayouts: You have a cashback payout in flight. Wait for it to settle, then try again — or contact support.
delete.blockedInFlightOrders: You have an order being fulfilled. Wait for it to finish (or expire), then try again — or contact support.
delete.blockedFailedWithdrawals: A failed withdrawal is awaiting compensation. Contact support about it before deleting your account.
delete.blockedBalanceNotZero: You have an unredeemed cashback balance. Spend it, or contact support to withdraw it, before deleting your account.

signedOut.heading: Wallet
signedOut.body: Sign in to link a Stellar wallet.

wallet.heading: Wallet
wallet.introPrefix: Link a Stellar wallet to receive your cashback as
wallet.introSuffix: on-chain. Unlinked, your cashback still accrues server-side — you just can't spend it outside of Loop until you link one.

homeCurrency.heading: Home currency
homeCurrency.introPrefix: Determines which LOOP asset your cashback lands in on-chain. Your current currency is
homeCurrency.locked: You've already placed an order, so your home currency is locked. Contact support to change it.

linked.heading: Linked address
linked.empty: No wallet linked. Add one below to start receiving on-chain cashback.

link.pubkeyHintPart2: . Make sure the wallet has a trustline to
link.pubkeyHintPart3: before linking — without it, payouts fail with
link.invalidAddress: That doesn't look like a Stellar public key.
link.fallbackError: Couldn't save — check the address and retry.

signedOut.heading: Cashback history
signedOut.body: Sign in to see your cashback activity.

cashback.heading: Cashback history
cashback.subtitle: Every credit-ledger event on your account — newest first.
cashback.pageError: Couldn't load this page of your history. Please try again in a moment.
cashback.empty: No cashback activity yet. Your first Loop order will show up here.
